topFindings.reason: Required entities, relationships, claims, or decision points are missing per CKO §8–§9.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Resolve critical gaps via assigned factory agents before publication review.

topFindings.reason: Condition neighborhoods require regional anatomy per condition.anatomy.min_structures.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add essential regional anatomy via anatomy builder or shared anatomy reuse.

topFindings.finding: Low evidence coverage (0% of proposals cite evidence)
topFindings.reason: Every proposal should cite supporting evidence per factory contract.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Ensure claim/relationship builders attach evidence_refs from the evidence packet.

topFindings.evidence: clavicle-fracture -[injured_in]-> clavicle; clavicle-fracture -[involves_anatomy]-> ac-joint; clavicle-fracture -[involves_anatomy]-> sternoclavicular-joint
topFindings.reason: Relationships must resolve to entities in the neighborhood graph.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Create missing entities or remove invalid relationship proposals.

topFindings.reason: Core diagnosis neighborhoods require standard clinical relationship patterns.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add has_classification relationship via relationship-builder agent.

topFindings.reason: Fracture neighborhoods require branching operative vs nonoperative pathways.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add emergency_escalation decision point with attending-gated review.

topFindings.reason: High-priority gaps block maturity level advancement.

topFindings.reason: Ontology contract requires complete relationship coverage.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.

topFindings.reason: Fracture diagnoses require classification when one exists clinically.

topFindings.suggestedFix: Route at_risk_structure, treated_by, and indicates_treatment edges to attending review.

topFindings.reason: Draft claims cannot be consumed as verified educational content.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Route claims through human review queue before publication.

topFindings.finding: Insufficient evidence support on claim proposals
topFindings.reason: Every claim should cite supporting evidence.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Attach evidence_refs from evidence packet to each claim proposal.

topFindings.reason: Trauma neighborhoods require emergency escalation pathways.
